---
title: "Spreadsheets Pathway"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
---

# Spreadsheets

Spreadsheets quietly power much of modern engineering, and they show up everywhere in DOFPro. This pathway collects the tools that turn spreadsheets from glorified calculators into serious problem-solving engines.

You’ll see basic statistics, linear regression, error propagation, nonlinear regression—and finally three videos introducing DWSIM, an open-source flowsheet simulator that does many of the same jobs, just with more industrial flair.

If you’ve ever thought, “It’s just Excel,” this pathway may respectfully change your mind.

{{< include /LinkKey.qmd >}}

## Introduction

**From Mole to Megawatt: The Full Journey Through Chemical and Thermal Engineering**<br/>*Intro to DOFPro CTP*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/8FEmNkiU1Jk), [Info Page](basics/intro/IntroTopicsWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/intro/1-MoleToMegawattVisuals.qmd)

## Introduction to Spreadsheets

**The Unauthorized Guide to Using Spreadsheets in Chemical Engineering**<br/>*Spreadsheet Basics*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/5XMeQ6vWymA), [Info Page](basics/calculations/SpreadsheetTechniquesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/calculations/BasicSpreadsheetTechniquesJTFVisuals.qmd)

**How to Have a Quickie with Your Data Part 1**<br/>*$\bar{x}$, $S_{\bar{x}}$, Linear Least Squares*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/4EfhlWNDQ48), [Info Page](basics/calculations/SpreadsheetTechniquesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/calculations/Video25Visuals.qmd)

**How to Have a Quickie with Your Data Part 2**<br/>*Nonlinear least squares*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/dVmh0EdQT1U), [Info Page](basics/calculations/SpreadsheetTechniquesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/calculations/Video26Visuals.qmd)

**Solving Nonlinear Equations with Spreadsheets**<br/>*See Title*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/SaI2qdu1wSE), [Info Page](basics/calculations/SpreadsheetTechniquesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/calculations/SolvingNonlinearEQsWithSpreadsheetsJTFVisuals.qmd)

**Interpol Is Late to a Mind-Blowing Math Hack, Just the Facts**<br/>*Linear Interpolation*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/VbnpWj9iYAU), [Info Page](basics/calculations/InterpolationWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/calculations/InterpolationJTFVisuals.qmd)

**Interpol Is Late to a Mind-Blowing Math Hack, The Full Story**<br/>*Linear Interpolation*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/pbDEc_Q862M), [Info Page](basics/calculations/InterpolationWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/calculations/InterpolationTFSVisuals.qmd)

**No Clear Interpretation a Mind-Blowing Math Hack**<br/>*Nonlinear Interpolation*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/721FxKwDRAU), [Info Page](basics/calculations/InterpolationWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/calculations/NLInterpolationJTFVisuals.qmd)

## Spreadsheets for Statistics

**How Deviant and Mean Are Your Data? Intro and Basics Part 1, Just the Facts**<br/>*Mean ($\mu,\ \bar{x}$) and Standard Deviation ($\sigma,\ S$)*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/ksg4Babav6o), [Info Page](basics/stats/BasicStatisticsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/stats/5-JTF-WhyStatsJTF1Visuals.qmd)

**How Deviant and Mean Are Your Data? Intro and Basics Part 1, The Full Story**<br/>*Mean ($\mu,\ \bar{x}$) and Standard Deviation ($\sigma,\ S$)*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/H82fqjDDQz8), [Info Page](basics/stats/BasicStatisticsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/stats/5-TFS-WhyStatsTFS1Visuals.qmd)

**How Deviant and Mean Are Your Data? Part 2**<br/>*Standard Error ($S_{\bar{x}}$) and Confidence Interval ($2\lambda$)*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/cBOrE6eV-AE), [Info Page](basics/stats/BasicStatisticsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/stats/5A-JTF-WhyStatsJTF2Visuals.qmd)

**Basic Statistics on a Spreadsheet**<br/>*$\bar{x}$, $S$, $S_{\bar{x}}$, $\lambda$ with a spreadsheet*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/RZ1kFVLvSxY), [Info Page](basics/stats/BasicStatisticsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](basics/stats/BasicStatsSpreadsheetJTFVisuals.qmd)

[This is NOT a DOFPro video.]{style="color: red;"}<br/>
**Linear Regression**<br/>*Derivation of the equations for linear regression*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/HsZhQyhg0tk), [Info Page](basics/stats/LinearRegressionVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

[This is NOT a DOFPro video.]{style="color: red;"}<br/>
**Linear Regression Spreadsheet**<br/>*Performing linear regression with a spreadsheet*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/7LBI7Ea2sx0), [Info Page](basics/stats/LinearRegressionVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

[This is NOT a DOFPro video.]{style="color: red;"}<br/>
**Error Propagation**<br/>*Propagating errors or uncertainties through equations and calculations*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/DiOs64kzSQw), [Info Page](basics/stats/ErrorPropagationVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

[This is NOT a DOFPro video.]{style="color: red;"}<br/>
**Integrals and Derivatives Part 1**<br/>*Propagating errors or uncertainties through numerical integrals and derivatives*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/_0AcGK7asfM), [Info Page](basics/stats/ErrorPropagationVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

[This is NOT a DOFPro video.]{style="color: red;"}<br/>
**Integrals and Derivatives Part 2**<br/>*More propagating errors or uncertainties through numerical integrals and derivatives*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/ej9O5ncO1iw), [Info Page](basics/stats/ErrorPropagationVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Nonlinear Regression**<br/>*Derivation/explanation of nonlinear regression*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/aE4W-JYnGgQ), [Info Page](basics/stats/NonlinearRegressionVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

## DWSIM

**Using DWSIM to Create Binary Phase Diagrams**<br/>*DWSIM, Binary Phase Diagrams*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/5NUchIg8q7E), [Info Page](balances/material/DWSIMBinaryPhaseVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Modeling the Rankine Cycle in DWSIM**<br/>*Modeling the Rankine Cycle in DWSIM*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/ECOWIrzvGNc), [Info Page](balances/entropy/RankineCycleInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Modeling the Vapor Compression Cycle in DWSIM**<br/>*Modeling the Vapor Compression Cycle in DWSIM*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/nWOz-Y7XsbQ), [Info Page](balances/entropy/TheVaporCompressionCycleVideoWebPage.qmd)
